problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
hypothesis: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Quantum. Quantum tunneling through energy barrier directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
